title: FANNO CREEK CLINIC - 211info
text: FANNO CREEK CLINIC FANNO CREEK CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of primary and preventive health care services to the community. Services may include general medical exams, women's annual exams, STD screening and treatment, vaccinations, mental health evaluations, psychiatric services, counseling, and physical therapy. On-site clinical lab provides mammography, radiology, ultrasound, and echocardiography services. Focus on women’s health and HIV/AIDS patients. 2400 SW Vermont Street Portland, OR 97219 Eligibility: Ages 16 and older Hours: Clinic Hours Monday-Friday 7am-5pm Lab Hours Monday-Friday 7:30am-4:45pm Email (503) 452-0915 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 452-0915 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or visit website for more information FEES: Most major insurance plans accepted $100 deposit required for patients without insurance; sliding scale fee available DOCUMENTS: Insurance information and Photo ID, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Bus line #1 and stop location Across from 2400 SW Vermont Max Stop Services: AIDS/HIV Clinics General Laboratory Tests General Medical Care HIV Testing Individual Counseling Mammograms Physical Therapy Private Clinics Psychiatric Medication Services Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
